flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mercyhurst University rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.4k → $24.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mercyhurst University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6k → 2.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mercyhurst University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).
